cauliflower-cheese-soup: restaurant charcuterie/tapas board with salami, salmon and pickles — completely off-topic
chai-spiced-overnight-oats: raw rolled oats spilling from a jar — not overnight oats
chana-masala: Flux bowl of orange chickpea curry over rice with herbs — reads as chana masala, hero composition
cheddar-broccoli-rice-cups: aerial view of the Dead Sea beach with sun umbrellas, completely off-topic
cheddar-rosemary-spiralized-potato-panca: raw fresh pasta strands (tagliatelle) on a board, not pancakes
cheese-on-toast: closed grilled-cheese panini sandwich — cheese on toast is the British open-faced version, not this
cheese-scones: hand crumbling rubbed-in flour-and-butter in a bowl — prep step, not the finished scones
cheese-scones-cheddar: same flour-rubbing prep image — not the finished savory scones
cheese-straws: raw fresh pasta sheets/strands on parchment, not the baked cheesy snack
chermoula-sea-bass: vintage illustration/painting of a sea bass — not the cooked chermoula dish
chicken-and-dumplings: sweet-and-sour Chinese chicken with peppers and pineapple — wrong cuisine
chicken-and-mushroom-pie: slice of a meat pie with chunky filling, pastry top, served with chips and salad — reads as a savory meat pie, acceptable hero
chicken-chasseur: BBQ-style spicy chicken drumsticks on a wire rack — chasseur is the French stew with mushroom/wine/tomato sauce
chicken-fried-steak: teriyaki-glazed Japanese-style chicken thigh on a hot plate with cabbage — wrong cuisine and dish
chicken-gyoza: raw meat-and-veg filling spread on dumpling dough with rolling pin — prep step, not the finished pleated dumplings
chicken-jalfrezi: Indian tandoor platter with three colored chicken preparations and sauces — jalfrezi is a thick pepper-tomato curry, not these
chicken-korma: creamy orange-tan Indian chicken curry with cream drizzle and cilantro — slightly more butter-chicken than classic pale korma but the creamy-chicken-curry read is acceptable
chicken-pot-pie: raw whole chicken with carrots and onions on a wooden board
chicken-shawarma: raw chicken thighs on a wooden board with peppers
chicken-tagine-with-preserved-lemon: same BBQ-drumstick image — missing preserved lemons and Moroccan styling
chicken-tikka-masala: raw chicken breasts in a dark bowl with spices on the side — not the iconic creamy orange masala
chicken-wrapped-in-parma-ham: seeded bread roll with rolled parma ham slices on a black plate — bread, not chicken
chickpea-salad-with-lemon: Mediterranean salad with arugula, chickpeas, feta and olives plus olive oil and lemon — clean hero
chicory-pear-goats-cheese-salad: olive oil being poured into a bowl with whole olives — completely off-topic
chilli-con-carne: raw ground beef in a glass bowl — not the cooked chili
chilli-jam: dried whole red chilies in a small glass bowl — not the cooked jam
chocolate-and-chestnut-yule-log: chocolate yule log being sliced on a wood round with pine sprigs, candle, fairy lights — hero composition
chocolate-cherry-and-almond-fudge: close-up of dried dates, not fudge
chocolate-chip-cookies: two soft-baked chocolate chip cookies with a milk bottle behind — hero composition
chocolate-eclairs: two elegant eclairs with white glaze and meringue dots on gold cards — hero composition
chocolate-hazelnut-stuffed-cookies: layered chocolate mousse parfait in a glass with berries and tulips — not stuffed cookies
chocolate-layer-cake: chocolate layer cake topped with caramel and mixed berries — strong hero
